sponsors.relevance_reason: The Tata Group previously held the title sponsorship rights for the IPL in 2022, making them a highly relevant sponsor for the IPL Fan Fest 2026. Their previous involvement with the IPL demonstrates their interest in cricket-related events.
MRF is an official sponsor of the IPL, which aligns with the cricket category of the IPL Fan Fest 2026. Their existing partnership with the IPL makes them a strong candidate for sponsorship.

Although Cadbury is currently partnered with the Premier League, their experience as an official snack partner could translate well to the IPL Fan Fest 2026. Their presence in India could also be an advantage.

As an official ball supplier for the Premier League, Nike has experience in partnering with sports events. Their global presence and reputation in the sports industry make them a potential sponsor for the IPL Fan Fest 2026.

Although Barclays is currently partnered with the Premier League, their experience as a title sponsor could be valuable for the IPL Fan Fest 2026. However, their lack of direct involvement with cricket may reduce their relevance.

As an official search partner for the NBA, Google has experience in partnering with sports events. Their global presence and reputation in the technology industry make them a potential sponsor for the IPL Fan Fest 2026.
Although EA Sports is currently partnered with La Liga, their experience in the sports industry and popularity among cricket fans could make them a potential sponsor for the IPL Fan Fest 2026.

Although Lucas Oil is currently partnered with the English football league, their experience as a main sponsor could be valuable for the IPL Fan Fest 2026. However, their lack of direct involvement with cricket may reduce their relevance.

resource_plan.logistics_notes: Arrange for catering, security, and crowd control. Ensure sufficient parking and transportation options.

ops_plan.event_day_summary: The IPL Fan Fest 2026 will feature a packed agenda with a mix of panel discussions, keynotes, workshops, and networking breaks. The event will bring together IPL team owners, players, legends, and fans for a day of engaging discussions and activities. The event will conclude with a closing ceremony and final networking session.
